seo.title: Movie Finder AI – Describe a Movie & Find Its Name | The Daily Drift
seo.description: Use the best free movie finder online. Find a movie by describing it, a scene, a character, or a quote. Our Movie Finder AI will identify it instantly.
seo.tags: Movie Finder AI, movie finder by description, movie finder online, find movie with description, movie finder free, movie finder ai online, movie identifier

hero.subtitle: Use our free movie finder online to identify any film. Just describe a scene, a character, or a vague plot — our AI will find the movie with description alone.

search.label: Describe your movie
search.placeholder: e.g. A sci-fi movie where a guy gets stranded on Mars and has to grow potatoes to survive...

examples.text: A movie about a guy who finds out his whole life is a TV show

steps.title: Describe It
steps.description: Type whatever you remember — a scene, a character, a feeling. Even vague descriptions work.

steps.title: AI Identifies
steps.description: Our AI cross-references millions of movies in seconds. Plot details, quotes, character traits — it understands them all.

steps.title: Get the Title
steps.description: Get the movie title, year, director, and a clean summary. No sign-up. No limits. Instantly.

items.question: How do I find a movie by description?
items.answer: Our Movie Finder AI analyzes your plot description and cross-references millions of films. Simply type what you remember—a scene, a quote, or character details—and our movie finder website will instantly identify the exact title.

items.question: Is this movie finder by description free?
items.answer: Yes, our movie finder by description is 100% free with no sign-up, no subscription, and no limits. Use this movie finder online as many times as you want — completely free forever.

items.question: Does this movie finder website work for Bollywood, anime, or international films?
items.answer: Absolutely! Our movie finder website works for Hollywood, Bollywood, Korean cinema, Japanese anime, European art-house films, and more. Just describe the movie in English, and the Movie Finder AI will accurately identify it regardless of its original language.

items.question: Can I find a movie with description if I only remember a vague scene?
items.answer: That is exactly what this tool is built for! You can find a movie with description even if it is vague or incomplete. Something like 'a movie where a kid befriends an alien and they fly on a bicycle' is more than enough for our AI to identify it.
